composio_raw.name: Attio
composio_raw.description: Attio is a fully customizable workspace for your team's relationships and workflows.

llm_raw.description: An AI-powered CRM designed for modern sales, offering flexible data structures and automated workflows.
llm_raw.notes: Relied on prior knowledge of Attio's developer platform and API documentation for authentication and API details.
